overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a lone character standing on a misty lakeside path at night, illuminated by a handheld lantern near a campfire settlement. In the foggy distance, a massive stone castle looms atop cliffs, creating a mysterious fantasy atmosphere with contrasting warm and cool lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty lakeside camping area with view of distant castle

events.description: white interaction prompt UI icon appears at bottom center of screen indicating available player action

agents.ego_description: standing motionless on a stone path holding a lantern, gazing toward the misty lake and distant castle

entered.detail: rocky path along the water's edge where the character stands holding a lantern
campsite with warm orange glow, tents and supplies visible in the mist
calm body of water reflecting the blue night sky and fog
massive stone fortress with lit windows perched on cliffs in the distance, partially obscured by thick fog
thick dark trees surrounding the lakeside area creating a natural enclosure

segments.scene_description: The character stands still on a stone path beside a misty lake at night, holding a lantern that casts a warm glow against the blue fog. To the left, a campfire illuminates a small settlement, while in the distance, a massive stone castle looms through the haze. The scene maintains a static, contemplative atmosphere with dense forest surrounding the area until a UI interaction prompt briefly appears.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a contemplative moment on a misty lakeside path that emphasizes the contrast between a small, warm settlement and a looming, distant fortress. It begins with a static view of a character standing on a stone path, where a handheld lantern casts a warm glow against the deep blue fog of the night. As the camera lingers, the light from a nearby campfire illuminates a small settlement to the left, while the surrounding dense forest frames the scene. The perspective then shifts slightly to reveal a massive stone castle looming through the haze in the far distance, before a UI interaction prompt briefly appears on the screen.
